text.title: Multi-Platform Design Parity Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing a Multi-Platform Design Parity artefact filled from a realistic input bundle. Trace runs from input brief → evidence gathering → schema fill → validator pass → review surfacing.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: A solopreneur runs Multi-Platform Design Parity against a single input bundle pulled from their working materials. They expect the artefact to be auditable by a downstream named reviewer without re-deriving the reasoning.

list.item: Source-of-truth refs: 1 design-file URL, 1 dashboard snapshot, 1 prior-cycle artefact.
Triggering activity matches AGENTS.md 'Applies If' list.
Step 2 — evidence array populated with ≥1 citation per non-trivial field.
